description: 集成终端域能力：Rust 双 PTY 会话生命周期管理与脚本派发。对应命令：ensure_terminal_session / write_terminal_input / resize_terminal_session / close_terminal_session / dispatch_script_to_terminal / cancel_terminal_run。事件名固定为 terminal:data / terminal:run-chunk / terminal:run-started / terminal:run-completed / terminal:interactive-ready / terminal:interactive-exited / terminal:state-changed。运行脚本默认走 rPTY per-run，完成判定只看 child.wait()。参见 ADR-20260425。注意：write_terminal_input 可写入任意字节，属高权限操作，前端 MUST 仅通过 services/tauri.ts 收口调用。
